name: DIED
short_description: Survive amidst colleagues turned into monsters due to a virus leak in this horror game. Explore the 10-floor underground lab to uncover the secrets.
detailed_description:
You are a scientist at a virus research lab where a deadly IAAD virus has leaked,
turning your colleagues into monsters.
Each floor presents various anomalies,
and you must navigate these to reach the next floor using the elevator.
Your ultimate goal is to reach the 10th floor and uncover all the secrets.

Play time
10~60 minutes

About video distribution
・Distribution is possible to both individuals and corporations without permission.
・Monet generation is possible only when using the functions provided by the video distribution site.
・We would appreciate it if you could include the game name in the video title or live broadcast title.

We are not responsible for any damage resulting from the distribution of this game video.
The contents of these guidelines may change without notice.

Option
Set the overall graphic settings.
If you do not have sufficient specs, it is better to set it to "Low" to avoid sickness.
